ruleName: # TIER 1 — Broad screening panel -> confirmatory PCR/ELISA
# Fires when the Vector Mosquito Panel broad detection test is positive.

actionTests: DENV NS1 Antigen ELISA(Mosquito)|DENV Pan-serotype RT-PCR(Mosquito)

ruleName: # TIER 2 — Confirmatory PCR -> speciation / sequencing / resistance profiling

actionTests: P. falciparum species-specific PCR(Mosquito)|P. vivax species-specific PCR(Mosquito)|P. malariae species-specific PCR(Mosquito)|P. ovale species-specific PCR(Mosquito)

conditionTests: DENV NS1 Antigen ELISA(Mosquito)|DENV Pan-serotype RT-PCR(Mosquito)

actionTests: Zika envelope gene sequencing(Mosquito)|Zika plaque reduction neutralization(Mosquito)
CHIKV E1 gene sequencing(Mosquito)|CHIKV virus isolation(Mosquito)

conditionTests: P. falciparum species-specific PCR(Mosquito)|P. vivax species-specific PCR(Mosquito)|P. malariae species-specific PCR(Mosquito)|P. ovale species-specific PCR(Mosquito)
